message:
fix(engine): include challenge_id and authorization_id in attestation canonical bytes

AttestationChallenge::canonical_bytes():
- Include challenge_id in the signing payload to prevent replay of
  signed challenges across different challenge IDs

CellAuthorization::canonical_bytes():
- Include authorization_id for collision resistance, preventing two
  authorizations with identical cell_id/epoch/policy but different
  authorization_ids from producing the same canonical representation

Both BTreeSet iterations documented as deterministic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
